{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution"
tags:
  * collaboration
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution


{quote}_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude (intellectual development, 2026-04){quote}

----





h2. AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution

_Concept Document_  
_Version:_ 1.0.0-draft  
_Date:_ 2026-04-19  
_Author:_ svend4  
_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude (intellectual development, 2026-04)  
_Status:_ Working proposal, seeking foundational partners  
_License:_ CC BY 4.0

----



----

* [[167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex]] (сходство 0.35)

h2. Упоминается в

* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work]]
* [[167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex|AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations]]
* [[52-author-contact|Author & Contact]]
* [[03-portal-protocol-md|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md]]
* [[73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1]]
* [[147-references|References]]
* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]
h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

h2. Связанные документы

* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work]] _60%_
* [[03-portal-protocol-md|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md]] _53%_
* [[73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1]] _53%_
* [[167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex|AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations]] _37%_
* [[52-author-contact|Author & Contact]] _37%_
* [[147-references|References]] _21%_
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers]] _21%_
* [[25-13-reference-implementation|13. Reference Implementation]] _21%_
